subcodes.first_line: O cherished remnant of that bird of the gardens of the Kingdom! Your numerous letters have arrived, and sighs and lamentations of separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن طیر حدائق ملکوت محررات متعدده آنجناب واصل و آه و انین از فراق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @business; financial; property matters
